summary: Sales Convert Deal Dialog Feature - All tests PASS. When Sales user clicks 'Project Onboarded' stage button in lead detail dialog, the full CRE-style 'Create Project from Deal' dialog appears with all required sections. Dialog scrolls properly, MultiPaymentInput works, and Cancel closes dialog. Backend API tests confirm Sales role can access /api/cre/convert-deal and /api/cre/convert-re-project endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Used existing lead: TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94 (lead_3720c0185ef5) in Deal Closed stage with RE project
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Convert Deal dialog is fully functional. The intercept triggers when clicking 'Project Onboarded' stage button in lead detail dialog. Dialog includes: RE Reference section (if lead has RE project), Project Details (name, location, sqft, building type, start date), Client Details (name, phone, email), Advance Payment with MultiPaymentInput component, and Accountant Verification checkbox. Dialog scrolls properly with style={ overflowY: 'auto' } on DialogContent. Cancel/Escape closes dialog without moving lead. Backend endpoints /api/cre/convert-deal and /api/cre/convert-re-project allow Sales role access.

feature_1_sales_login.description: Login as Sales user via Demo Access tab
feature_1_sales_login.evidence: Successfully logged in as Divya Pillai (Sales)

feature_2_kanban_board.description: Kanban board loads with all stages including 'Project Onboarded'
feature_2_kanban_board.evidence: Screenshot shows Kanban with stages including Deal Closed (2 leads) and Project Onboarded (4 leads)

feature_3_lead_detail_dialog.description: Click on lead card opens lead detail dialog with Move to Stage section
feature_3_lead_detail_dialog.evidence: Dialog shows lead info, tabs (Overview, Summary, Follow-ups, Remarks), and Move to Stage buttons

feature_4_convert_deal_dialog_trigger.description: Clicking 'Project Onboarded' stage button opens 'Create Project from Deal' dialog
feature_4_convert_deal_dialog_trigger.evidence: Dialog appeared with title 'Create Project from Deal' and subtitle 'Review and edit project details, then collect advance payment'

feature_5_dialog_sections.description: Dialog has all required sections: RE Reference, Project Details, Client Details, Advance Payment, Accountant Verification
feature_5_dialog_sections.evidence: All sections verified with data-testid attributes: convert-project-name, convert-location, convert-client-name, convert-advance-amount, convert-accountant-checkbox, confirm-convert-deal-sales

feature_6_dialog_scrolling.description: Dialog scrolls properly - advance payment section, accountant checkbox, and buttons visible when scrolling
feature_6_dialog_scrolling.evidence: Dialog has style={ overflowY: 'auto' } on DialogContent, all sections accessible via scroll

feature_7_multi_payment_input.description: MultiPaymentInput appears when advance amount is entered with Bank Transfer dropdown, amount field, Ref/Txn ID field
feature_7_multi_payment_input.evidence: Screenshot shows payment entry with Bank Transfer dropdown, amount 50,000, Ref/Txn ID field, and 'Balanced' badge

feature_8_accountant_checkbox.description: Accountant Verification checkbox is clickable and required for form submission

feature_9_cancel_behavior.description: Cancel button closes dialog without changes
feature_9_cancel_behavior.evidence: After clicking Cancel, dialog closed and returned to lead detail dialog

feature_10_backend_sales_access.description: Sales role can access POST /api/cre/convert-deal/{lead_id} endpoint
feature_10_backend_sales_access.evidence: Backend test test_03_sales_convert_deal_endpoint_access PASSED - Sales did not get 403 Forbidden

feature_11_backend_convert_re_project.description: Sales role can access POST /api/cre/convert-re-project/{re_project_id} endpoint

frontend_dialog.fields: RE Reference, Project Details, Client Details, Advance Payment with MultiPaymentInput, Accountant Verification checkbox
